title: Not enough modifications
body:
Not Enough Mods is a kitchen sink style modpack designed for players who want to experience everything at once. There’s no strict progression — instead, you get complete freedom to create, explore, and experiment your own way.

🛠️ Technology: From Create to Mekanism and Applied Energistics 2, automation possibilities are endless.
🪄 Magic: Mods like Ars Nouveau let you harness mystical powers and craft your own spells.
🌍 World: Expanded biomes, new mobs, and challenging structures bring your world to life.
🏗️ Creativity: Build, automate, combine mods, and shape a unique world without limits.

This is the modpack where there are never enough mods.
